headline: Booking.com Makes it Easier Than Ever to Star in Your Own Movie-Inspired Route 66 Road Trip for the Iconic Highway's 100th Anniversary
summary: Start the engine. Cue the playlist. Booking.com, the Official Travel Partner of the Route 66 Centennial, is offering a road trip experience this spring that puts travelers behind the wheel of a movie-inspired classic car. This once-in-a-lifetime opportunity arrives as road trips continue to increase in popularity, with Booking.com research showing the U.S. is one of the top road trip markets in the world.
